title: 🧱 Anti-Memory Architecture
name: Anti-Memory Architecture
what_it_is: Structures designed to eliminate memory—buildings that induce forgetfulness, rooms that erase reason for entering.
how_to_use: he lives in a forgetting house—each day he rediscovers his room
her footsteps echo in unremembered halls—intent wiped at the threshold
animation_behavior: Paths reconfigure after use, rooms forget the viewer, visual context strips away on entry
